revision.comment: Adding Commons category link to [[:Commons:Category:Airborne units and formations|category with the same name]]
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Commons category|Airborne units and formations}} [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Military units and formations by type]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Airborne warfare]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Military units and formations by type]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: append category metadata
revision.text: {{Commons category|Airborne units and formations}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Airborne warfare]] }} [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:Airborne units and formations]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata de]] [[de:Category:Luftlandeverband]] [[ar:Category:وحدات وتشكيلات محمولة جوا]] [[commons:Category:Airborne units and formations]] [[he:Category:יחידות צנחנים]] [[it:Category:Unità militari aviotrasportate]] [[ja:Category:空挺部隊]] [[ko:Category:공수부대]] [[no:Category:Militære fallskjermavdelinger]] [[pt:Category:Unidades e formações aerotransportadas]] [[sk:Category:Výsadkové jednotky]] [[sl:Category:Padalske enote]] [[th:Category:หน่วยและรูปขบวนส่งกำลังทางอากาศ]] [[tr:Category:Havadaki birimler ve oluşumlar]] [[ur:Category:ہوا برداشتہ اکائیاں اور تشکیلات]] [[zh:Category:空降兵]] This category was confirmed from de→Wikidata links on [[Category:Luftlandeverband_(Japanisches_Kaiserreich)]].
